_meta.notes: Tool-call support marked where verified or known from model family docs. 'untested' = not yet verified on this NIM plan.

deepseek-ai/deepseek-v4-pro.notes: DeepSeek's flagship. Excellent at HTML/CSS/SVG design generation. Strong instruction following.

deepseek-ai/deepseek-v4-flash.notes: Timed out at 20s in test — may work with longer timeout. Skip for now, use V4 Pro.

qwen/qwen3-coder-480b-a35b-instruct.notes: Massive code-specialist. Best on NIM for SVG generation, complex HTML/CSS, animation code.

qwen/qwen3-next-80b-a3b-instruct.notes: Current Hermes fallback #1. Fast and reliable tool calls. Good for web/UI/prototype tasks.

qwen/qwen3-next-80b-a3b-thinking.notes: Thinking/reasoning variant. No tool calls in thinking mode. Use for analysis only.

qwen/qwen3.5-122b-a10b.notes: Current Hermes fallback #3. Long-form writing quality. Good for deck/blog/email content.

qwen/qwen3.5-397b-a17b.notes: Largest Qwen3.5. Potentially very capable. Untested for tool calls on this plan.

qwen/qwen2.5-coder-32b-instruct.notes: Previous gen Qwen coder. Reliable for code tasks, superseded by qwen3-coder-480b.

nvidia/llama-3.3-nemotron-super-49b-v1.notes: Current OD default for infographic/dashboard. Good at structured JSON and reasoning.

nvidia/llama-3.3-nemotron-super-49b-v1.5.notes: Newer v1.5. Drop-in upgrade from v1. Use this over v1 going forward.

nvidia/llama-3.1-nemotron-ultra-253b-v1.notes: VERIFIED NOT_FOUND: 404 on this NIM plan. Not available.

nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b.notes: Nemotron-3 family. Newer than nemotron-4. Untested on this plan.

moonshotai/kimi-k2.6.notes: VERIFIED TOOLS_OK with valid key. Previous 404 errors were from expired key, not model limitation. 1M context. Self-identifies as K2.5 (NIM internal). Suitable as Hermes default.

moonshotai/kimi-k2-instruct.notes: Standard K2 instruct. Smaller context than k2.6. May support tool calls - untested.

moonshotai/kimi-k2-thinking.notes: Thinking mode only. Requires temp=1.0. No tool calls.

meta/llama-3.3-70b-instruct.notes: Current Hermes fallback #4. Fastest option with tool support. Reliable workhorse.

meta/llama-4-maverick-17b-128e-instruct.notes: VERIFIED NO_TOOLS: Returns tool call schema as plain text instead of actual function calls. NIM implementation broken. Do not use for tool-calling workflows.

meta/llama-3.2-90b-vision-instruct.notes: Best vision model on NIM. Use for image analysis tasks.

meta/llama-3.2-11b-vision-instruct.notes: Smaller vision model. Faster than 90B, less capable.

mistralai/mistral-large-3-675b-instruct-.notes: Largest Mistral. Very capable. Worth testing for design tasks.

mistralai/devstral-2-123b-instruct-2512.notes: Mistral's dev/code specialist at 123B. Good candidate for HTML/CSS design generation.

mistralai/mistral-large.notes: Original Mistral Large. Superseded by mistral-large-3.

openai/gpt-oss-120b.notes: VERIFIED TOOLS_OK. Surprisingly capable. Worth considering for design tasks. Origin unclear but performs well.

openai/gpt-oss-20b.notes: VERIFIED TOOLS_OK. Fast and capable. Good fallback option.

google/gemma-4-31b-it.notes: Gemma 4. Multimodal capable. Untested on this plan.

nvidia/llama-3.1-nemotron-nano-vl-8b-v1.notes: Vision-language Nemotron. Small but fast for vision tasks.

nvidia/nemotron-nano-12b-v2-vl.notes: Vision-language Nemotron v2. Updated version of the VL model.

mistralai/codestral-22b-instruct-v0.1.notes: Mistral's code model. Fast option for lightweight code tasks.

stepfun-ai/step-3.5-flash.notes: StepFun's flash model. Unknown capabilities on NIM. Untested.

z-ai/glm-5.1.notes: Latest GLM from Zhipu AI. Untested on this plan.

writer/palmyra-creative-122b.notes: Creative writing specialist. Potentially good for marketing copy, LinkedIn posts.

google/deplot.notes: Specialized for chart/graph understanding. Converts visual charts to data tables. Use for data extraction from images.

baai/bge-m3.notes: Multilingual embeddings. Use for semantic search.
